atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a pop sensation at the time of injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional pain to the degree of eleven on a scale

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain particularly when walking his dog

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any other recent injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wearing a brace

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using THC cream for pain relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals mild swelling and bruising of the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Gait reveals a slight limp

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is generally preserved, although with some stiffness in the morning

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsiflexion causes pain, while plantar flexion does not

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with knee extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he has not resumed skiing since the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a strain of the posterior cruciate ligament in the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The strain is likely secondary to the prior injury sustained during skiing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Mild arthritis was observed on examination

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The mild arthritis may contribute to the reported pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am prescribing meloxicam 15 mg daily for pain and inflammation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am prescribing ibuprofen 800 mg twice daily as needed for the left knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend continuing bracing for the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend physical therapy three times per week

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend avoiding skiing and other strenuous activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up in four weeks if symptoms persist
